blocks.text: ABSOLUTE REGRESSION
blocks.translation: ABSOLUTE REGRESSION

blocks.text: SCRIPT  JP ART  PARK  JIN  HWAN ORIGINAL  JANG  YUNGHOON
blocks.translation: SCRIPT JP ART PARK JIN HWAN ORIGINAL JANG YUNGHOON

blocks.text: WHY  DID YOU  WANT  TO SEE  ME ?
blocks.translation: WHY DID YOU WANT TO SEE ME?

blocks.text: THERE  ARE  MANY REASONS ,  BUT  YOU  WOULDN'T BELIEVE  THEM  ANYWAY .  IF  I  HAD TO  GIVE  YOU  A  REASON  WORTH BELIEVING ,  IT'S  MY  WAY  OF KEEPING  MY  OPPONENT IN  CHECK .
blocks.translation: THERE ARE MANY REASONS, BUT YOU WOULDN'T BELIEVE THEM ANYWAY. IF I HAD TO GIVE YOU A REASON WORTH BELIEVING, IT'S TO KEEP MY OPPONENT IN CHECK.

blocks.text: KEEPING  THEM IN  CHECK ?
blocks.translation: KEEP THEM IN CHECK?

blocks.text: YES , MY  BROTHER  HAS STARTED  MEETING PEOPLE .
blocks.translation: YES, MY BROTHER HAS STARTED MEETING PEOPLE.

blocks.text: I'M  TRYING TO  SHOW  HIM  THAT I  CAN  ALSO  MEET WITH  PEOPLE .
blocks.translation: I'M TRYING TO SHOW HIM I CAN DO THE SAME.

blocks.text: THE  FIRST OF  THOSE  PEOPLE IS  YOU .
blocks.translation: YOU'RE THE FIRST OF THOSE PEOPLE.

blocks.text: WILL  ANYTHING CHANGE  JUST  FROM MEETING  PEOPLE ?
blocks.translation: DO YOU THINK MEETING PEOPLE WILL CHANGE ANYTHING?

blocks.text: I  KNOW  YOUR RESOLVE  REGARDING MY  BROTHER  IS UNWAVERING .
blocks.translation: I KNOW YOUR RESOLVE AGAINST MY BROTHER IS UNWAVERING.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: WHAT WOULD  YOU KNOW ?
blocks.translation: WHAT DO YOU KNOW?

blocks.text: YOU  SHOWED  ME THE  DAY  HE  RETURNED , DIDN'T  YOU ?
blocks.translation: YOU SAW HIM THE DAY HE RETURNED, DIDN'T YOU?

blocks.text: I  FELT  YOUR AFFECTION  FOR  HIM DEEPLY  AT  THAT MOMENT .
blocks.translation: I FELT YOUR AFFECTION FOR HIM IN THAT MOMENT.

blocks.text: DON'T PRESUME  TO KNOW  ME .
blocks.translation: DON'T PRETEND TO KNOW ME.

blocks.text: INHA
blocks.translation: INHA

blocks.text: MY  BROTHER  CAN  BE DIFFICULT  BECAUSE  OF HIS  SELFISHNESS .
blocks.translation: MY BROTHER CAN BE DIFFICULT TO DEAL WITH BECAUSE OF HIS SELFISHNESS.

blocks.text: YOU  SHOULD COUNSEL  AND LOOK  AFTER HIM  WELL .
blocks.translation: YOU SHOULD COUNSEL AND CARE FOR HIM WELL.

blocks.text: YOU  REALLY ARE  SO  FAKE .
blocks.translation: YOU'RE SO FAKE.

blocks.text: DID YOU  THINK  I'D  BE MOVED
blocks.translation: DID YOU THINK I’D BE MOVED

blocks.text: BY  WORDS LIKE  THAT ?
blocks.translation: BY WORDS LIKE THAT?

blocks.text: THAT'S  NOT  IT . I  WAS  SPEAKING  ILL OF  MY  BROTHER  BEHIND HIS  BACK  BY  CALLING HIM  A  SELFISH PERSON .
blocks.translation: THAT'S NOT IT. I WAS SPEAKING BEHIND HIS BACK, CALLING HIM A SELFISH PERSON.

blocks.text: YOUR  BROTHER  IS A  PERCEPTIVE  MAN .
blocks.translation: YOUR BROTHER IS A PERCEPTIVE MAN.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: HE  LACKS HUMAN  WARMTH , THOUGH .
blocks.translation: BUT HE LACKS HUMAN WARMTH.

blocks.text: THAT'S  FINE . A  MAN  DESTINED  FOR GREATNESS
blocks.translation: THAT'S FINE. A MAN DESTINED FOR GREATNESS

blocks.text: SHOULDN'T BE  SWAYED  BY  PETTY PERSONAL  FEELINGS .
blocks.translation: SHOULDN'T BE SWAYED BY PETTY PERSONAL FEELINGS.

blocks.text: HE  MAY  EVEN DISRESPECT  YOU AT  TIMES .
blocks.translation: HE MAY EVEN DISRESPECT YOU SOMETIMES.

blocks.text: THAT'S  FINE . WHAT  DOES  IT  MATTER  IF HE  DISRESPECTS  ME ?  HE'S DESTINED  TO  BECOME A  HEAVENLY  DEMON .
blocks.translation: THAT'S FINE. WHAT DOES IT MATTER IF HE DISRESPECTS ME? HE'S DESTINED TO BECOME A HEAVENLY DEMON.

blocks.text: RS
blocks.translation: RS

blocks.text: HE  WILL BREAK  IMPORTANT PROMISES  TOO .
blocks.translation: HE’LL BREAK IMPORTANT PROMISES TOO.

blocks.text: WHAT  A  HEAVENLY DEMON  SAYS  AND  DOES IS  THE  LAW !
blocks.translation: WHAT A HEAVENLY DEMON SAYS AND DOES IS LAW!

blocks.text: WHETHER IT'S  IMPORTANT OR  UNIMPORTANT , FULFILLING
blocks.translation: WHETHER IT'S IMPORTANT OR NOT, A PROMISE OR NOT, THE HEAVENLY DEMON DECIDES IT ALL!

blocks.text: A  PROMISE OR  NOT .  THE  HEAVENLY DEMON  DECIDES ALL  OF  IT !
blocks.translation: YOU REALLY ARE BLAZE-RESISTANT.

blocks.text: YOU TRULY  ARE  BEYOND REPROACH .
I  DRINK  THIS WINE  WITH  RESPECT FOR  YOU .
blocks.translation: I DRINK THIS WINE WITH RESPECT FOR YOU.

blocks.text: I'LL  ADMIT THAT  YOU'RE  SKILLED  IN HANDLING  PEOPLE ,
blocks.translation: I'LL ADMIT YOU'RE GOOD WITH PEOPLE,

blocks.text: BUT  YOU WON'T  BE  ABLE TO  SWAY  ME .
blocks.translation: BUT YOU WON'T SWAY ME.

blocks.text: I'M  A  DIFFERENT PERSON  FROM  SWORD DEMON  OR  THE  SKY  HEAVEN CULT  LEADER .
blocks.translation: I’M NOT THE SAME AS THE SWORD DEMON OR SKY HEAVEN CULT LEADER.

blocks.text: I  KNOW  THAT . AS  I  MENTIONED  BEFORE , I  NEVER  INTENDED  TO  MAKE YOU  ONE  MY  PEOPLE  IN THE  FIRST  PLACE .
blocks.translation: I KNOW THAT. AS I SAID BEFORE, I NEVER PLANNED TO RECRUIT YOU.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: ... SO  WHY ARE  YOU  DOING THIS ?
blocks.translation: ... SO WHY DO THIS?

blocks.text: I  WANTED TO  KNOW  WHAT  KIND OF  PERSON  YOU  ARE .  I  WAS CURIOUS  ABOUT  WHO  STANDS BESIDE  MY  BROTHER  AND PROTECTS  HIM ,
blocks.translation: I WANTED TO SEE WHAT KIND OF PERSON YOU ARE. I WAS CURIOUS WHO STANDS WITH MY BROTHER AND PROTECTS HIM,

blocks.text: AND  I'VE  COME  TO A  CONCLUSION .
blocks.translation: AND I’VE DECIDED.

blocks.text: MY  BROTHER WOULD  BE  THE GREATEST  FOOL IN  THE  CULT
blocks.translation: MY BROTHER WOULD BE THE BIGGEST FOOL IN THE CULT

blocks.text: IF  HE  WERE  TO EVER  HURT  YOUR FEELINGS .
blocks.translation: IF HE EVER HURT YOUR FEELINGS.

blocks.text: WHEN  I  SEE  YOU , I  THINK  OF  YOU  AS A  LITTLE  GIANT .
blocks.translation: WHEN I LOOK AT YOU, I SEE A LITTLE GIANT.

blocks.text: YOU  ARE GREATER  THAN
blocks.translation: YOU’RE GREATER THAN

blocks.text: ANYONE  ELSE .
blocks.translation: ANYONE ELSE.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: A  LITTLE GIANT ...
blocks.translation: A LITTLE GIANT...

blocks.text: I  ONCE THOUGHT  OF  MYSELF THAT  WAY ,
blocks.translation: I ONCE SAW MYSELF THAT WAY,

blocks.text: BUT  NO  ONE HAS  EVER  CALLED ME  THAT
blocks.translation: BUT NO ONE EVER CALLED ME THAT.

blocks.text: DOES  HE KNOW  WHAT  I'M THINKING ... ? !
blocks.translation: DOES HE KNOW WHAT I'M THINKING...?

blocks.text: PLEASE  TAKE GOOD  CARE  OF MY  BROTHER .
blocks.translation: PLEASE TAKE GOOD CARE OF MY BROTHER.

blocks.text: YOU'RE REALLY  ASKING ME  TO  LOOK  AFTER THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER ?
blocks.translation: YOU’RE ASKING ME TO LOOK AFTER THE FIRST YOUNG MASTER?

blocks.text: I  INTEND  TO END  THE  SENSELESS KILLING  IN  THE  SUCCESSION STRUGGLE  DURING MY  GENERATION .
blocks.translation: I PLAN TO END THE SENSELESS KILLING IN THIS GENERATION'S SUCCESSION STRUGGLE.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: WHAT ?
blocks.translation: WHAT?

blocks.text: FOR  THAT TO  HAPPEN ,  WE  CAN'T APPROACH  EACH  OTHER EMOTIONALLY .
blocks.translation: FOR THAT TO HAPPEN, WE CAN'T GET EMOTIONAL WITH EACH OTHER.

blocks.text: BUT  MY BROTHER  HAS  A  STRONG SENSE  OF  PRIDE ,  SO  IT  WILL BE  DIFFICULT  FOR  HIM TO  CONTROL  IT .
blocks.translation: BUT MY BROTHER HAS A STRONG PRIDE, SO IT’LL BE HARD FOR HIM TO CONTROL IT.

blocks.text: PLEASE  STAY AT  HIS  SIDE  AND HELP  HIM .
blocks.translation: PLEASE STAY BY HIS SIDE AND HELP HIM.

blocks.text: IF  YOU'RE THERE ...  EVEN  IF  MY BROTHER  RAMPAGES , YOU  MIGHT  BE  ABLE TO  STOP  HIM .
blocks.translation: IF YOU’RE THERE... EVEN IF MY BROTHER RAGES, YOU MIGHT BE ABLE TO STOP HIM.

blocks.text: YOU  UNDERSTAND NOTHING  ABOUT  ME .
blocks.translation: YOU DON’T UNDERSTAND ME AT ALL.

blocks.text: IF  THE FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  RAMPAGES , THEN  I'LL  POUR  OIL ON  THAT  FIRE .
blocks.translation: IF THE FIRST YOUNG MASTER RAGES, I’LL STOKE THAT FIRE.

blocks.text: YOU  CAN'T  BECOME THE  SUCCESSOR  WITH A  SMALL  EXPLOSION .
blocks.translation: YOU CAN’T BECOME SUCCESSOR WITH JUST A SMALL OUTBURST.

blocks.text: I'LL  INCITE HIM  TO  BLOW EVERYTHING AWAY .
blocks.translation: I’LL PUSH HIM TO BLOW EVERYTHING UP.

blocks.text: IF  YOU  BELIEVE THE  SUCCESSION CAN  BE  DECIDED PEACEFULLY ,
blocks.translation: IF YOU THINK SUCCESSION CAN BE PEACEFUL,

blocks.text: THEN  YOU'RE
blocks.translation: THEN YOU’RE

blocks.text: EITHER  A  FOOL OR  A  LUNATIC .
blocks.translation: EITHER A FOOL OR MAD.

blocks.text: EVERYONE  WHO KNOWS  ME  SAYS I'M  CRAZY ,
blocks.translation: EVERYONE WHO KNOWS ME SAYS I’M CRAZY,

blocks.text: SO  I  SUPPOSE I  MUST  BE .
blocks.translation: SO I GUESS I AM.

blocks.text: I  HATE LUNATICS .
blocks.translation: I HATE LUNATICS.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: EXE
blocks.translation: EXE

blocks.text: DOD
blocks.translation: DOD

blocks.text: AFTER
blocks.translation: AFTER

blocks.text: SEEING THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER ,  I  SUDDENLY  WANTED TO  SEE  THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  AGAIN .
blocks.translation: SEEING THE SECOND YOUNG MASTER, I SUDDENLY WANTED TO SEE THE FIRST YOUNG MASTER AGAIN.

blocks.text: I  THINK  I  NEED TO  SEE  HIM  MORE BEFORE  I  CAN SLEEP .
blocks.translation: I THINK I NEED TO SEE HIM MORE BEFORE I CAN SLEEP.

blocks.text: YOU'RE BACK ?
blocks.translation: YOU’RE BACK?

blocks.text: HE  DOESN'T EVEN  ASK  WHY  I'VE COME  AGAIN  WHEN WE  JUST  MET .
blocks.translation: HE DIDN’T EVEN ASK WHY I CAME AGAIN AFTER WE JUST MET.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: THAT'S
blocks.translation: THAT IS

blocks.text: RIGHT .
blocks.translation: RIGHT.

blocks.text: THE  FIRST YOUNG  MASTER  HAS NEVER  BEEN  ONE  TO  REVEAL PERSONAL  CURIOSITY  OR EMOTION  EASILY .
blocks.translation: THE FIRST YOUNG MASTER ISN’T ONE TO SHOW PERSONAL CURIOSITY OR EMOTION EASILY.

blocks.text: HE'S NOT  A  FLAME  THAT WAVERS  AT  SUCH THINGS .
blocks.translation: HE'S NOT A FLICKERING FLAME AT SUCH THINGS.

blocks.text: THE  SECOND YOUNG  MASTER  CAME TO  VISIT  ME .
blocks.translation: THE SECOND YOUNG MASTER VISITED ME.

blocks.text: MUGEUK ?
blocks.translation: MUGEUK?

blocks.text: YES .
blocks.translation: YES.

blocks.text: I  SEE .
blocks.translation: I SEE.

blocks.text: WHY  DON'T YOU  ASK  WHY  HE CAME  AND  WHAT  WE DISCUSSED ?
blocks.translation: WHY DON’T YOU ASK WHY HE CAME AND WHAT WE TALKED ABOUT?

blocks.text: BECAUSE  I TRUST  YOU .
blocks.translation: BECAUSE I TRUST YOU.

blocks.text: YES , THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  IS  THIS  KIND OF  PERSON .
blocks.translation: YES, THE FIRST YOUNG MASTER IS THIS KIND OF PERSON.

blocks.text: HE'S  NOT  DELICATE NOR  ELOQUENT ,  BUT GENUINE  AS  GOLD .
blocks.translation: HE’S NOT DELICATE OR ELOQUENT, BUT AS GENUINE AS GOLD.

blocks.text: IT  WAS RIGHT  TO  COME FIND  HIM .
blocks.translation: IT WAS RIGHT TO COME FIND HIM.

blocks.text: I  SHALL TRUST  IN  HIM .
blocks.translation: I’LL TRUST IN HIM.

blocks.text: PLEASE HAVE  A  GOOD REST .
blocks.translation: PLEASE, REST WELL.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: OFFERING  THE SUPREME  DEMON  POSITION TO  THE  BLOOD  HEAVENS  SWORD DEMON  WAS  FOR  THE  PURPOSE OF  WINNING  HIM  OVER .
blocks.translation: OFFERING THE SUPREME DEMON TITLE TO BLOOD HEAVENS' SWORD DEMON WAS TO WIN HIM OVER.

blocks.text: WHY  IS HE  EXPLAINING NOW ... ?
blocks.translation: WHY EXPLAIN NOW...?

blocks.text: HE  WOULDN'T  DO IT  WHEN  I  BEGGED FOR  IT ,
blocks.translation: HE WOULDN’T WHEN I BEGGED HIM,

blocks.text: SO  WHY DO  SO  AFTER  GEOM MUGEUK  HAS  COME
blocks.translation: SO WHY AFTER GEOM MUGEUK CAME?

blocks.text: TO  SEE  ME ?
blocks.translation: TO SEE ME?

blocks.text: WHEN  I BECOME  THE  HEAVENLY DEMON ,  THE  SUPREME DEMON  POSITION  WILL NATURALLY  BE YOURS .
blocks.translation: WHEN I BECOME THE HEAVENLY DEMON, THE SUPREME DEMON POSITION WILL NATURALLY BE YOURS.

blocks.text: ARE  YOU ANXIOUS  BECAUSE GEOM  MUGEUK  MIGHT SWAY  ME
blocks.translation: ARE YOU WORRIED THAT GEOM MUGEUK MIGHT SWAY ME?

blocks.text: EVEN  THOUGH YOU  ORIGINALLY THOUGHT  I  CAN'T BE  SWAYED ?
blocks.translation: EVEN THOUGH YOU ORIGINALLY THOUGHT I CAN’T BE SWAYED?

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: DIDN'T YOU  SAY  YOU TRUST  ME ?
blocks.translation: DIDN’T YOU SAY YOU TRUST ME?

blocks.text: THIS  PAINS ME  EVEN  AS  I  TRY  TO UNDERSTAND
blocks.translation: IT HURTS EVEN AS I TRY TO UNDERSTAND YOU.

blocks.text: YOU .
YES , NOW  YOU  KNOW  HOW MUCH  GEOM  MUGEUK HAS
blocks.translation: YES, NOW YOU SEE HOW MUCH GEOM MUGEUK HAS

blocks.text: CHANGED .
blocks.translation: CHANGED.

blocks.text: om
blocks.translation: om

blocks.text: YOUR YOUNGER  BROTHER IS  AN  OPPONENT  WHO DEMANDS  SUCH VIGILANCE .
blocks.translation: YOUR YOUNGER BROTHER IS A FORMIDABLE OPPONENT.

blocks.text: BUT  THERE'S  NO NEED  TO  LOSE  FAITH IN  YOURSELF ...
blocks.translation: BUT THERE’S NO NEED TO LOSE FAITH IN YOURSELF...

blocks.text: I  KNEW  IT WOULD  NATURALLY BE  THIS  WAY .
blocks.translation: I KNEW THIS WOULD HAPPEN NATURALLY.

blocks.text: I  WORRIED  YOU MIGHT  MISUNDERSTAND MY  INTENTIONS  SINCE I'M  SPEAKING  TO YOU  AT  A  TIME
blocks.translation: I WORRIED YOU’D MISUNDERSTAND MY INTENTIONS SPEAKING TO YOU SOON AFTER SEEING MY YOUNGER BROTHER.

blocks.text: WHEN  YOU'VE  JUST SEEN  MY  YOUNGER BROTHER .
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
WHAT MISUNDERSTANDING WOULD  I  HAVE ?
blocks.translation: WHAT MISUNDERSTING?

blocks.text: I'M  SIMPLY GRATEFUL  FOR HOW  MUCH  YOU VALUE  ME .
blocks.translation: I’M JUST GRATEFUL FOR HOW MUCH YOU VALUE ME.

blocks.text: THAT'S  ONLY NATURAL .  PLEASE  DON'T SAY  SUCH  THINGS .
blocks.translation: THAT’S NATURAL. PLEASE DON’T SAY OTHERWISE.

blocks.text: THEN  I  SHALL TAKE  MY  LEAVE .
blocks.translation: I’LL TAKE MY LEAVE THEN.

blocks.text: HE'S  STILL YOUNG ,  THAT'S ALL .
blocks.translation: HE’S JUST YOUNG, THAT’S ALL.

blocks.text: IF  HE WERE  PERFECT LIKE  THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER ,  WHY  WOULD I  NEED  HIM ?
blocks.translation: IF HE WAS PERFECT LIKE THE SECOND YOUNG MASTER, WHY WOULD I NEED HIM?

blocks.text: RATHER  THAN  SOMEONE LIKE  THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER  WHO  IS  AS  CUNNING AS  A  SNAKE ,  IT'S  BETTER  TO HAVE  THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  WITH  HIS WEAKNESSES .
blocks.translation: BETTER TO HAVE THE FIRST YOUNG MASTER WITH HIS WEAKNESSES THAN A SNAKE-LIKE SECOND YOUNG MASTER.

blocks.text: I  JUST ...  NEED TO  WATCH  OVER  HIM CAREFULLY .
blocks.translation: I JUST… NEED TO WATCH OVER HIM CAREFULLY.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
blocks.translation: ASURASCANS.COM

blocks.text: 작화 도움 박종일 석은 정 성현
blocks.translation: 작화 도움 박종일 석은 정 성현

blocks.text: JHS STUDIO
blocks.translation: JHS STUDIO
